_comment:
Gimbal accelerometer calibration. PX4-only procedure via MAVSDK's Calibration plugin: the gimbal must be detected on the bus and able to report its accelerometer for the autopilot to characterise its mounting. ArduPilot has no equivalent MAVSDK call (param-driven approach lives on the separate `do.calibrate.gimbal.neutral` command).

- declined → escalate(connectExternalSensor): gimbal not on the bus, or MAVLink component address not responding.
- didNotConverge → escalate(holdStill): gimbal moved during sampling.

Overall budget is 60s — procedure itself is fast; the bulk of the time is operator setup.

then.detail: Gimbal accelerometer calibration is PX4-only (uses the MAVSDK Calibration plugin). On ArduPilot, use the param-driven `recipe.fleet.calibrate.gimbal.neutral` workflow instead.
Gimbal calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
